claims.summary: Semantic persistence should not fall off a cliff across the 25 percent fill boundary.
claims.disposition: verify smooth stale-window interpolation, recovery hold/release shaping, hysteresis, and exact boundary tests

claims.summary: High-entropy semantic content should receive explicit extra persistence at high fill.
claims.disposition: verify semantic_entropy_persistence_multiplier is implemented and covered by high-fill regressions

claims.summary: Sigmoid or stronger entropy-retention tuning could preserve dense texture longer.
claims.disposition: retain exact Tier 5 wait because stale-window and persistence changes alter Minime sensory cadence and regulation
